description: The County Road Cutters are a hooligan firm associated with Premier League football club Everton F.C. They were one of the largest hooligan firms in England during the 1980s and early 1990s. The firm is known for adopting casual clothing and designer garments in the 1970s and has been involved in high-profile clashes, including the 2005 'Battle of Everton Valley' with Manchester United's Red Army.
